name: Automotive Analytics
overview: Queensland’s automotive sector, from large-scale dealership networks flanking the Pacific Motorway to specialised logistics hubs in Wacol and Yatala, demands rigorous inventory and sales margin control. Automotive Chief Financial Officers battle isolated Dealer Management Systems (DMS) that obscure precise tracking of floorplan financing, used vehicle stock velocity, and service department profitability. Headquartered in Brisbane, Roar Data constructs uncompromising Power BI dashboards for QLD automotive groups. We fuse multi-site DMS data, exposing immediate used-stock aging risks, tracking F&I (Finance and Insurance) penetration rates, and optimising high-margin service bay utilisation, empowering principals to aggressively drive dealership yields.
whoIsItFor: ["Dealer Principals managing multi-franchise networks across South East Queensland.", "Automotive Group CFOs requiring consolidated margin tracking from Pacific Motorway dealership strips.", "Service and Parts Directors overseeing high-volume mechanical workshops in Yatala and Wacol."]
commonProblems: ["Inability to consolidate multi-franchise Dealer Management Systems prevents group-level margin visibility.", "Static stock aging reports delay aggressive price adjustments on depreciating used vehicle inventory.", "Poor visibility into service bay utilisation causes critical bottlenecks and lost high-margin labour revenue."]
useCases: ["Automated multi-site used vehicle stock aging and gross margin compression dashboards.", "Real-time Finance and Insurance (F&I) penetration and profitability tracking models.", "Service bay capacity, technician efficiency, and parts inventory turnover visualisations."]
kpis: ["Used Vehicle Stock Turn Ratio", "F&I Penetration Percentage", "Service Bay Utilisation Rate", "Gross Profit Margin (Front vs Back End)"]

name: COO Operational Performance & Business Operations Intelligence
overview: Chief Operating Officers steering large-scale workforces and supply chains from Brisbane’s commercial epicentres face constant pressure to protect margins against rising labour and logistical costs. The primary barrier is relying on fragmented departmental reporting that fails to expose the cascading effects of operational bottlenecks. Roar Data, Brisbane’s leading operations analytics consultancy, deploys highly advanced Power BI dashboards explicitly for the COO. We ingest live capacity telemetry, workforce rostering limits, and supply chain constraints, delivering an uncompromising, unified operational scorecard. This empowers QLD COOs to decisively correct workflow inefficiencies, optimise multi-site resource allocation, and surgically improve EBITDA.
